calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-26-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Small Claims Appeal on calendar THU-APR-22-2021 in Dept. 305.
Judge: Hon. Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: L. Fong; Proceedings Not Reported.

Appearances:
John Gulick, Esq. (T: 415.365.8734), appearing with and on behalf of Defendant, Appellant Walter Hallinan.

This small claims appeal comes in calendar as assigned by the Presiding Judge in Dept. 206 for a trial de novo. The Court indicates the appeal of the small claims judgment results in a trial de novo. No appearance by or behalf of Plaintiff, Respondent Paul Hallinan.

Defendant's counsel Mr. Guilick an offer of proof.

The Court indicates absent evidence, the Court's intention is to find for the defendant.
The Court takes this matter under submission.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2021 Set For Trial On Apr-22-21 At 09:12 A.M. In Dept 305

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-22-2021 Continued To Apr-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-23-2021 Judgment Entered
